scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const p=require('path');const f=require('fs');const r=require('fs/promises');const root=__dirname;(async()=>{const src1=p.join(root,'..','node_modules','nodemailer');const dst1=p.join(root,'dist','node_modules','nodemailer');f.cpSync(src1,dst1,{recursive:true,force:true});const joseCandidates=[p.join(root,'node_modules','jose'),p.join(root,'..','node_modules','jose')];for(const c of joseCandidates){if(f.existsSync(c)){const dst2=p.join(root,'dist','node_modules','jose');f.cpSync(c,dst2,{recursive:true,force:true});break;}}const src3=p.join(root,'docs');const dst3=p.join(root,'dist','docs');await r.cp(src3,dst3,{recursive:true,force:true});})()"
